mapper.select: SELECT S.STAY_ID, S.NAME, S.ADDR, S.LAT, S.LNG, S.FACILITIES, NVL(R.MIN_PRICE, 0) AS minPrice, NVL(R.ROOM_CNT, 0) AS roomCount, (SELECT F.FILE_URL FROM TB_FILE F WHERE F.REF_TYPE = 'STAY' AND F.REF_ID = S.STAY_ID AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS THUMB_PATH FROM TB_STAY S LEFT JOIN ( SELECT STAY_ID, MIN(PRICE_PER_NIGHT) AS MIN_PRICE, COUNT(*) AS ROOM_CNT FROM TB_STAY_ROOM WHERE STATUS_CD = 'APPROVE' GROUP BY STAY_ID ) R ON S.STAY_ID = R.STAY_ID WHERE S.STATUS_CD IN ('ACTIVE', 'NORMAL') ORDER BY S.STAY_ID
SELECT STAY_ID, BIZ_NO, NAME, ADDR, LAT, LNG, PET_POLICY, REFUND_POLICY, FACILITIES, STATUS_CD, CHECK_IN, CHECK_OUT, DESCRIPTION, PET_FEE FROM TB_STAY WHERE STAY_ID = #{stayId}
SELECT ROOM_ID, STAY_ID, NAME, PRICE_PER_NIGHT, CAPACITY, PET_LIMIT, STATUS_CD FROM TB_STAY_ROOM WHERE STAY_ID = #{stayId} AND STATUS_CD = 'APPROVE' ORDER BY PRICE_PER_NIGHT

SELECT P.PET_ID AS petId, P.PET_NAME AS petName, P.SPECIES AS species, P.BREED AS breed, P.AGE AS age FROM TB_PET P WHERE P.MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND NVL(P.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' ORDER BY P.IS_REPRESENT DESC, P.PET_ID ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_RESERVATION.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TB_RESERVATION ( CHECKIN_DATE, CHECKOUT_DATE, MEMBER_NO, NIGHT_CNT, PET_ID, REG_DATE, REQUEST_MEMO, RESV_ID, RESV_NO, RESV_TYPE, RESV_DATE, RESV_TIME, ROOM_ID, STATUS_CD, TARGET_ID, TOTAL_AMOUNT ) VALUES ( #{checkinDate}, #{checkoutDate}, #{memberNo}, #{nightCnt}, #{petId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SYSDATE, #{requestMemo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{resvId}, #{resvNo}, #{resvType}, #{resvDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{resvTime, jdbcType=DATE}, #{roomId}, #{statusCd}, #{targetId}, #{totalAmount} )
mapper.select: SELECT R.RESV_ID, R.RESV_NO, R.RESV_TYPE, R.MEMBER_NO, R.PET_ID, R.TARGET_ID, R.ROOM_ID, R.CHECKIN_DATE AS checkinDate, R.CHECKOUT_DATE AS checkoutDate, R.NIGHT_CNT AS nightCnt, R.REQUEST_MEMO AS requestMemo, R.TOTAL_AMOUNT AS totalAmount, R.STATUS_CD, R.REG_DATE, M.MEMBER_NAME AS memberName, P.PET_NAME AS petName, P.SPECIES AS petSpecies, P.BREED AS petBreed, S.NAME AS stayName, SR.NAME AS serviceName FROM TB_RESERVATION R JOIN TB_MEMBER M ON M.MEMBER_NO = R.MEMBER_NO JOIN TB_PET P ON P.PET_ID = R.PET_ID LEFT JOIN TB_STAY S ON S.STAY_ID = TO_NUMBER(R.TARGET_ID) LEFT JOIN TB_STAY_ROOM SR ON SR.ROOM_ID = R.ROOM_ID WHERE R.RESV_ID = #{resvId}

SELECT R.REVIEW_ID AS reviewId, R.TARGET_ID AS targetId, R.MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, R.RESV_ID AS resvId, R.RATING AS rating, R.CONTENT AS content, R.BIZ_REPLY AS bizReply, R.REG_DATE AS regDate, M.NICKNAME AS nickname, P.PET_NAME AS petName, P.SPECIES AS petSpecies FROM TB_REVIEW R JOIN TB_MEMBER M ON M.MEMBER_NO = R.MEMBER_NO LEFT JOIN TB_RESERVATION RV ON RV.RESV_ID = R.RESV_ID LEFT JOIN TB_PET P ON P.PET_ID = RV.PET_ID WHERE R.REVIEW_TYPE = 'STAY' AND R.TARGET_ID = #{stayId} ORDER BY R.REG_DATE DESC, R.REVIEW_ID DESC
SELECT ROOM_ID, STAY_ID, NAME, PRICE_PER_NIGHT, CAPACITY, PET_LIMIT FROM TB_STAY_ROOM WHERE ROOM_ID = #{roomId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_PAYMENT.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TB_PAYMENT ( PAYMENT_ID, RESV_ID, PAY_TYPE, PAY_METHOD, PAY_AMOUNT, TOSS_PAYMENT_KEY, TOSS_ORDER_ID, PAY_STATUS, PAY_DATE ) VALUES ( #{paymentId}, #{resvId}, 'RESERVATION', #{payMethod, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{payAmount}, #{tossPaymentKey}, #{tossOrderId}, #{payStatus}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_RESERVATION SET STATUS_CD = 'DONE' WHERE RESV_TYPE = 'STAY' AND STATUS_CD = 'CONFIRMED' AND CHECKOUT_DATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT NVL(POINT_BALANCE, 0) FROM TB_MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_POINT ( POINT_ID, MEMBER_NO, POINT_TYPE, POINT_AMOUNT, BALANCE_AFTER, REASON_CD, REF_TYPE, REF_ID, REG_DATE ) VALUES ( (SELECT NVL(MAX(POINT_ID), 0) + 1 FROM TB_POINT), #{memberNo}, 'USE', #{pointAmount}, #{balanceAfter}, 'PAYMENT', #{refType}, #{refId}, SYSDATE )
